series_title: น้องช้างจอมพลังแห่งความดี
episode_title: ช้างน้อยและภารกิจเก็บตุ๊กตา

global_settings.character_consistency: Baby anthropomorphic elephant, soft grey skin, wearing blue pajamas with bear and star prints
global_settings.video_style: 3D Animation, Pixar style, cinematic soft lighting

storyboard.image_prompt: An adorable baby anthropomorphic elephant (Little Chang), standing on two legs, wearing cute blue cartoon patterned pajamas with bears and stars. Sitting on a messy wooden floor surrounded by scattered stuffed animals. Cinematic lighting, soft glow. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_motion_prompt: Little Chang sits on the floor looking around at the mess, his trunk twitches curiously, subtle head tilt, eyes blinking naturally. Soft camera zoom-in.
storyboard.audio_script: ทำไมตุ๊กตาเต็มไปหมดเลยนะ?

storyboard.image_prompt: Little Chang, baby elephant in blue pajamas, looking up with a confused expression. A tall shadow of his mother approaches from the side. An empty colorful toy basket is visible in the corner. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_motion_prompt: A shadow moves across the floor towards Chang. Chang reacts by looking up and perking his large ears. His trunk curls slightly in surprise.
storyboard.audio_script: ช้างน้อยคะ วันนี้เราต้องช่วยกันเก็บของเล่นให้หมดนะ

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up portrait of Little Chang's face, baby elephant identity, wearing blue patterned pajamas. Huge innocent eyes, bright smile, determined expression. Soft skin texture. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_motion_prompt: Little Chang smiles widely, nods his head confidently, and lifts his trunk high in a heroic gesture. Sparkling eye glints.
storyboard.audio_script: โอเคครับแม่ ผมจะเป็นฮีโร่เก็บตุ๊กตา!
